name: rest_countries
description: Get country details from REST Countries by name, code, region, language, or all countries.

mode.description: Query mode: 'name' for country name, 'alpha' for ISO code, 'region' for region, 'lang' for language, 'all' for all countries.

query.description: Query value matching the selected mode (for example, 'taiwan' for name, 'TW' for alpha, 'asia' for region, 'chinese' for lang, '' for all).

fields.description: Comma-separated fields to include in the response (for example, 'name,capital,population,flags,currencies,languages').
